name: First Prize Gingerbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cream butter and brown sugar together until smooth.
3. Add molasses, warm milk, ginger, cinnamon, mace, and nutmeg; stir well.
4. Stir in brandy (or brandy flavoring) into the mixture.
5. Beat eggs until very light and thick.
6. Sift flour and cream of tartar together.
7. Mix flour mixture and beaten eggs alternately into the molasses mixture.
8. Stir in orange juice and zest.
9. Dissolve baking soda in warm water, then add to bread mixture and beat until light.
10. Add raisins; mix gently.
11. Pour batter into a loaf pan or muffin tins.
12. Bake for about 30 minutes. Muffins may take less time.
13. To prevent raisins from sinking, sprinkle them with flour before adding to the batter.
